ns2:test-suite.name: Able to Successfully call the Advisor from the mirror,
ns2:test-suite.title: Able to Successfully call the Advisor from the mirror,

test-case.name: should be able to call the Advisor from the mirror
test-case.title: should be able to call the Advisor from the mirror

failure.message: CompoundError: One or more errors occurred. --- Error: unknown error: Element <body class="screen-off">...</body> is not clickable at point (640, 399). Other element would receive the click: <html>...</html> (Session info: chrome=83.0.4103.106) (Driver info: chromedriver=2.43.600229 (3fae4d0cda5334b4f533bede5a4787f7b832d052),platform=Mac OS X 10.15.3 x86_64) at UserContext.<anonymous> (/Users/sof.machines/qa-end-to-end/tests/ShopfloorApp/specs/shopfloorAndMirror/callAdvisor.spec.js:25:50) --- End of stack trace --- error properties: Object({ matcherName: '', passed: false, expected: '', actual: '' }) Error: unknown error: Element <body class="screen-off">...</body> is not clickable at point (640, 399).
